title: Sets and Relations
subject: Mathematics
content:
# Sets and Relations

## 1. Sets
A set is a well-defined collection of objects.
- **Representation:** Roster form or Set-builder form.
- **Types:** Empty set, Finite/Infinite sets, Equal sets, Subsets.

## 2. Relations
A relation $R$ from a non-empty set $A$ to a non-empty set $B$ is a subset of the Cartesian product $A \times B$.
